betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fluid Enricher (Enricher)§f:
The Enricher (nuclearcraft:enricher) is a single-block machine that infuses fluids with solid materials to create enriched solutions. It is the wet counterpart to the Manufactory's dry dust production.

§6Slot Layout (EnricherRecipes.java:13)§f:
1 item input → 1 fluid input → 0 item output → 1 fluid output. The Enricher takes a solid dust and a fluid, and produces a fluid solution.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:112)§f:
Pattern "PHP / LCL / PMP" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: P = plateAdvanced, H = vanilla Hopper, L = gemLapis, C = chassis, M = motor. Yields 1 Enricher.

§6What It Does (EnricherRecipes.java:18-38)§f:
The Enricher produces all of NC's saturated solutions from their dry dusts:
- §bBoron Nitride Dust + Water → Boron Nitride Solution§f
- §bFluorite Dust + Water → Fluorite Water§f
- §bCalcium Sulfate Dust + Water → Calcium Sulfate Solution§f
- §bSodium Fluoride Dust + Water → Sodium Fluoride Solution§f
- §bPotassium Fluoride Dust + Water → Potassium Fluoride Solution§f
- §bSodium Hydroxide Dust + Water → Sodium Hydroxide Solution§f
- §bPotassium Hydroxide Dust + Water → Potassium Hydroxide Solution§f
- §bBorax Dust + Water → Borax Solution§f
- §bIrradiated Borax Dust + Water → Irradiated Borax Solution§f (radioactive)
- §bAmmonium Sulfate Dust + Water → Ammonium Sulfate Solution§f
- §bAmmonium Bisulfate Dust + Water → Ammonium Bisulfate Solution§f
- §bAmmonium Persulfate Dust + Water → Ammonium Persulfate Solution§f
- §bHydroquinone Dust + Water → Hydroquinone Solution§f
- §bSodium Hydroquinone Dust + Water → Sodium Hydroquinone Solution§f
- §bPotassium Hydroquinone Dust + Water → Potassium Hydroquinone Solution§f

§6Special Recipes (EnricherRecipes.java:35-40)§f:
- §bGlowing Mushroom + Ethanol → RadAway§f: 3 mushrooms + 25mB ethanol → 25mB RadAway (slow = redstone ethanol variant)
- §bSnowball + Liquid Helium → Cryotheum§f (only when Thermal Foundation is NOT loaded): 4 snowballs + 25mB LHe → 25mB cryotheum

§6Direct Descendants of Enricher (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 4 items used in the Enricher recipe:
- plateAdvanced (nuclearcraft:part:1)
- gemLapis (minecraft)
- motor (nuclearcraft:part:8)
- Hopper (vanilla)

§6Role in NC Chemistry Chain§f:
The Enricher is the bridge between dry dusts and fluid solutions. The full chemistry chain is:
- §bDust → Solution§f: Enricher
- §bSolution → Other Solution§f: Chemical Reactor
- §bSolution → Dust§f: Crystallizer (inverse of Enricher)

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30021 (Alloy Furnace) — the basic NC unlock.

§eTip§f: Build an Enricher-Crystallizer pair to recycle solutions back into dry dusts. This is useful for storing fluids in compact form and transporting them efficiently.

§eTip§f: For early-game RadAway, set up a small mushroom farm + Enricher. This is the only way to cure radiation sickness in the pre-QMD era.

§cWarning§f: Some Enricher outputs (Irradiated Borax Solution) are radioactive. Use Rad-Shielded Containers for storage and transport.
